title: Replace hero background with AI illustration image

requirements.summary: Generate an AI illustration image suitable for a solar energy services hero background and save it as a frontend asset
acceptanceCriteria: A new AI-style illustrated image is generated and saved to frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-ai-illustration.dim_1920x1080.png
The image visually represents solar energy themes (panels, sunlight, clean landscape) in an illustrated art style
The image is high-resolution and suitable for a full-screen hero background

file_operations.description: Generate and save an AI illustration depicting a vibrant modern solar energy landscape with solar panels, bright sunshine rays, green fields, and a clear sky in an illustrated art style. This image will serve as the new hero section background, replacing the current Samaleswari Temple image. Dimensions: 1920x1080 pixels, optimized for full-screen hero display.

requirements.summary: Update the Hero component to use the newly generated AI illustration image as the background
acceptanceCriteria: The Hero component's background references the new AI illustration image from the generated assets folder
The hero section displays the AI illustration as a full-screen background
Existing hero content (headline, CTA buttons, trust-stat cards) remains intact and readable over the new background
Any overlay or text contrast adjustments are applied to maintain readability

file_operations.description: Replace the current Samaleswari Temple background image reference with the newly generated AI illustration image from frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-ai-illustration.dim_1920x1080.png. Ensure the background image covers the full hero section using appropriate CSS (background-size: cover, background-position: center). Preserve all existing hero content including the headline, WhatsApp CTA button, scheme CTA button, and the three trust-stat cards (speed, cost, shield). Verify that the text overlay remains readable over the new AI illustration background; adjust the overlay opacity or add text shadows if needed to maintain contrast and readability.
